sidebar.preview.title: Site preview
topbar.appearance.label: Appearance
topbar.language.label: Language
auth.brand.name: Bocchi
login.page.title: Login
login.page.heading: Welcome back to Bocchi
login.page.description: Sign in to manage Home Server, preview the protected frontend, and continue publishing.
login.external.title: Other login methods
login.external.empty: No external login providers are ready yet.
login.error.disabled: This account does not exist or has been disabled.
login.error.providerNotReady: That login method has not been fully configured.
login.error.externalMissing: The external login result could not be read.
login.error.externalEmailMissing: The external account did not return a bindable email.
login.error.externalUserMissing: The external account was verified, but an Admin must create or enable the matching user first.
login.error.externalBindFailed: External account binding failed. Check the account on the Users page.
denied.page.title: No access
denied.page.heading: Dashboard access required
denied.page.description: The current account is signed in, but it does not have the Admin role needed to enter the Dashboard.
setup.page.title: Setup
setup.page.heading: Initialize your Bocchi
setup.page.description: Create the highest-privilege Admin account to start managing your server.
setup.admin.title: Create the first Admin
setup.site.title: Configure your Bocchi site
setup.site.description: Confirm the public site name, default title, and frontend Theme before entering Admin.
setup.field.defaultTitle.placeholder: Used when a page has no custom title
setup.field.description.placeholder: A short summary for public display and search
setup.passwordStrength.label: Password strength:
setup.site.note: These values are saved as Home Server site settings.
setup.action.payloadNote: Keep the Admin account details safe.
setup.action.note: After completion, the public Setup entry closes and Admin opens.
setup.helper.title: First run guide
setup.helper.description: This is the first run of your Bocchi Home Server; Setup initializes the required data.
setup.helper.databaseText: This is the first run of Bocchi Home Server. After the guide is complete, the system initializes the underlying database structure and basic network settings.
setup.helper.permissionsText: The account created here has absolute system control. Remember the password and avoid weak combinations.
setup.helper.nextStepsText: After creating the account, you will configure public site information and the default Theme.
setup.helper.closesText: Once the first Admin exists, this page redirects to Admin or Login.
setup.helper.frontendText: Site basics sync to workspace site.yaml so Generator and Theme input read the same facts.
setup.helper.warning: Only run Setup on your own server.
setup.error.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
setup.error.publicUrlInvalid: Default frontend URL must be an absolute http or https URL.
setup.error.payloadExpired: Setup step 1 has expired. Please enter the Admin account again.
home.page.title: Overview
home.page.heading: Good afternoon. Pick something to write today.
home.page.description: Open a fresh note, finish a draft, or tweak a page — everything sits one click away.
home.guide.welcome.title: Welcome to Bocchi
home.guide.welcome.body: This is your Admin home. Browse recent work, post a quick note, or preview the live site whenever you need.
home.guide.site-language.title: Set your site languages
home.guide.site-language.body: Pick the primary language and the enabled list. Dashboard UI language stays a separate Admin preference in the topbar.
home.guide.site-theme.title: Choose a site theme
home.guide.site-theme.body: The public site look comes from the active theme. Preview and switch from settings any time.
home.guide.edit-page.title: Edit your pages
home.guide.edit-page.body: Pages are long-lived blocks like About, navigation notes, or a work index. Start arranging them whenever you like.
home.quick.writePost.title: Write a post
home.quick.writePost.subtitle: Open the editor and shape a longer piece.
home.quick.writeNote.title: Post a note
home.quick.writeNote.subtitle: Share something quick under 500 characters.
home.quick.editPage.title: Edit a page
home.quick.editPage.subtitle: Arrange About, navigation, and other stable pages.
home.quick.publish.title: Publish the site
home.quick.publish.subtitle: Export everything once checks are clear.
home.composer.toolbar.disabledHint: This control is on the roadmap.
home.composer.postEmptyDescription: Open the full editor below to keep the home page focused on at-a-glance work.
home.preview.title: Site preview
home.preview.description: Visible only to admins; publish the site for public access.
home.recent.title: Recent content
home.recent.emptyDescription: Start creating: write a post, publish a work, or share something fresh.
kind.posts.title: Posts
kind.posts.description: Use posts to show readers your world.
kind.notes.title: Notes
kind.notes.description: Photos, thoughts, and fresh moments to share as they happen.
kind.works.title: Works
kind.works.description: Content grouped by project or piece of work.
kind.pages.title: Pages
kind.pages.description: Always-on pages like About and Friends.
category.editor.title: Category editor
category.page.heading: Category tree
category.page.description: Manage the hierarchy of post and work categories. Only stores names and slugs; assignment lives on each piece of content.
category.page.kindAria: Pick the content kind these categories belong to
category.editor.validation.emptyName: Fill in every category name before saving.
category.workbench.emptySelection: Pick a category on the left, or add a new root one.
category.workbench.dragHandle: Drag to reorder or change parent
localizedInput.staleHint: This language is disabled, but its value is preserved. Re-enable it in site settings to keep editing.
workspace.remote.title: Connect content repository
workspace.remote.description: The content repository syncs Markdown, media, and site settings only. It is not a static-site publish target.
workspace.remote.name: Remote name
workspace.remote.connectionRequired: Choose a GitHub account connection first.
workspace.remote.repositoryRequired: New content repository name is required.
workspace.remote.createdFormat: Created and connected {0}; content branch is {1}.
publish.page.title: Publish
publish.page.heading: Publish site
publish.page.description: Generate static files in one step, or publish through a saved publish plan.
publish.addPlan.heading: Add publish plan
publish.addPlan.description: After saving a target, one-click publish uses the default plan.
publish.addPlan.formDescription: Name the plan first, then connect GitHub and choose the publish target.
publish.addPlan.errorUnsupportedChannel: This publish channel is not available yet.
publish.localOutput.heading: Local output
publish.localOutput.description: Manage the local output directory used by every generation run.
publish.localOutput.title: Local output directory
publish.localOutput.emptyDescription: This page will manage the local output location, cleanup rules, and retention policy.
publish.nav.publishDescription: Generate, preview, and download site files.
publish.oneClick.title: Ready to publish?
publish.oneClick.description: Without a publish plan, Bocchi generates downloadable static files; after you add a default plan, it publishes to that target.
publish.plans.title: Publish plans
publish.plans.description: Manage remote or automated targets used by one-click publish.
publish.plans.emptyDescription: After you add a plan, one-click publish sends generated static files to the default target.
publish.statusCard.title: Site status
publish.activity.title: Recent activity
publish.activity.emptyDescription: No generation or publish records yet
publish.plan.name: Publish plan name
publish.output.title: Generate site files
publish.output.description: After generation, preview the site, download a Zip, or hand it to external deployment.
publish.github.title: GitHub Pages
publish.github.description: Publish the generated static output to a GitHub repository branch and let GitHub Pages serve that branch.
publish.github.tokenSavedPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the saved token
publish.github.ensurePagesSource: Keep GitHub Pages source pointed at this branch root
publish.github.historyEmpty: No GitHub Pages publish history yet.
publish.github.errorTokenRequired: GitHub token is required before the first publish.
publish.github.connectDescription: Authorize with GitHub instead of copying a token manually.
publish.github.authorizationPending: GitHub authorization is not complete yet.
publish.github.authorizationSlowDown: GitHub asked Bocchi to slow down checks. Try again shortly.
publish.github.repositoryDescription: Use a dedicated repository and branch by default so content repositories are not overwritten.
publish.github.branchMissing: This branch does not exist and will be created on publish.
publish.github.branchEmpty: This branch is empty and can be used.
publish.github.branchManaged: This branch is already managed by Bocchi.
publish.github.branchOccupied: This branch already has content and no Bocchi marker.
publish.github.errorOAuthNotConfigured: GitHub authorization needs an OAuth client id.
publish.github.errorBranchTakeoverRequir: Confirm takeover before using this existing branch.
publish.advanced.emptyLogManifest: Run a publish once to see logs and artifact details here.
publish.result.succeededDescription: The static site is ready to download or hand to an external publisher.
publish.result.skippedDescription: No content changed, so this run skipped duplicate generation.
publish.result.failedDescription: One step did not finish. Open the advanced log to locate the stage.
publish.history.title: Recent generation history
publish.history.emptyDescription: After the first generation, recent results appear here.
settings.page.title: Settings
settings.page.heading: Settings
settings.page.description: Manage site profile, localization, sign-in options, users, and runtime paths from focused pages.
settings.profile.title: Site profile
settings.profile.description: These values describe the public site and the default frontend Theme contract.
settings.localization.title: Localization
settings.localization.description: Dashboard language is only your Admin UI preference. Site languages describe the public site and future Theme Context.
settings.localization.dashboardDescripti: Saved in a culture cookie so it can switch the current Admin UI without touching the frontend Theme.
settings.localization.searchLanguagesPla: Search code, native name, or English name
settings.localization.urlPolicyValue: Primary language has no prefix; other languages use a language prefix.
settings.localization.customDescription: Use this for languages not in the built-in list. Bocchi suggests BCP 47 tags but keeps custom codes editable.
settings.localization.customIncomplete: Custom language needs code, native name, and English name.
settings.localization.customDuplicate: This language already exists in the picklist.
settings.localization.commonTextDescript: Optional plain text overrides for shared Theme labels. Leave a field blank to use the Theme default.
settings.localization.commonTextSearchPl: Search menu, common, or content keys
settings.localization.commonTextNoResult: No text key matches this search.
settings.localization.commonTextSelectKe: Select a key on the left to start editing.
settings.localization.commonTextSaved: Common theme text has been saved.
settings.login.title: Third-party login
settings.login.description: Configure login providers without exposing saved secrets back into the form.
settings.login.secretPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep existing secret
settings.login.savedDescription: Login page buttons now follow enabled and complete Provider settings.
settings.system.title: System
settings.system.description: Read-only operational paths for the current Home Server runtime.
settings.system.databaseDescription: Local state and protected keys used by Home Server.
settings.system.dataDescription: DataRoot is runtime data; workspace is user content.
settings.users.title: Users
settings.users.description: Keep Dashboard access intentional. Early M4 keeps a single Admin business role; non-Admin users may exist but cannot enter Dashboard workflows.
siteNavigation.page.title: Navigation
siteNavigation.page.heading: Navigation
siteNavigation.page.description: Edit the frontend primary menu. Desktop, mobile, and nested rendering are owned by the active Theme.
siteNavigation.editor.title: Primary Menu
siteNavigation.editor.detailEmptyDescrip: Choose an item from the tree to edit its target and text.
siteNavigation.editor.labelMode.plainHel: Use one fixed label for every language.
siteNavigation.editor.labelMode.siteI18n: Use a Common i18n key and edit text for each enabled site language here.
siteNavigation.editor.labelMode.themeI18: This item keeps an existing Theme private i18n reference. Theme private text is managed on Theme customization.
i18nField.mode.label: Text mode
i18nField.mode.autoHelp: Leave empty so the generator can fill it from the target.
i18nField.themeRefHelp: This reference is resolved by the active theme. Edit its value in Theme customization; when switching themes use the migration wizard if the new theme does not declare this key.
themeMigration.page.title: Theme migration
themeMigration.page.heading: Theme i18n migration
themeMigration.page.descriptionFormat: Switching from {0} to {1}. The menu items below reference theme i18n keys — choose how each one should be handled.
themeMigration.status.noEntries: No theme references in the current menu — the switch can be applied directly.
siteNavigation.warning.title: Some targets are unavailable in the current content or Theme
siteNavigation.warning.unresolvedFormat: “{0}” points to {1}:{2}; public Theme input will skip this menu item.
contentEditor.description.empty: Create or open Markdown content, then edit the body, frontmatter, and preview.
contentEditor.description.editor: Shape the title, summary, and body first; use the right-side settings when publishing. Saving refreshes the content index.
contentEditor.picker.heading: Choose Markdown to edit
contentEditor.picker.emptyBody: Scan the workspace from Content, or create a new draft from the post/page lists.
contentEditor.error.heading: Needs attention
contentEditor.field.summaryPlaceholder: Describe what this piece gives readers in one sentence.
contentEditor.body.title: Body
contentEditor.advanced.title: Advanced Frontmatter
contentEditor.advanced.help: Keeps custom YAML fields. You usually do not need to edit this for normal publishing.
contentEditor.status.title: Content status
contentEditor.language.title: Language & versions
contentEditor.language.unsavedDraft: Save this draft before adding language versions.
contentEditor.language.unavailable: Language versions will appear after the content index is refreshed.
contentEditor.language.saveReminder.body: Save the current content first. The saved version becomes the base for this localization group.
contentEditor.language.create.title: Add language version
contentEditor.language.create.empty: Every enabled site language already has a version in this group.
contentEditor.language.create.copy: Copy current content as initial content
contentEditor.language.create.statusHint: The new language version is always created as a draft.
contentEditor.settings.title: Content settings
contentEditor.slug.reservedRoute: This path identifier conflicts with a system route.
contentEditor.slug.pageTaken: This path identifier is already used by another page.
contentEditor.slug.yearUnavailable: The current content path does not expose a publishing year.
contentEditor.slug.yearScopedTaken: This path identifier is already used by another item in the same year.
contentEditor.template.label: Page template
contentEditor.template.unavailableWarnin: This page stores template “{0}”, which is not declared by the current Theme. Saving will keep that name.
contentEditor.ai.title: AI assistant
contentEditor.ai.unavailable: No AI provider is available right now.
contentEditor.ai.slug.label: Generate path identifier with AI
contentEditor.ai.confirm.title: Generate path identifier with AI
contentEditor.ai.confirm.body: AI will generate a path identifier from the current title and summary.
contentEditor.ai.failure.title: Failed to generate path identifier
contentEditor.ai.failure.body: AI could not generate a path identifier. Enter one manually or try again later.
contentEditor.delete.body.draft: This deletes the saved draft source file, same-directory assets, and content index entry.
contentEditor.delete.body.permanent: This deletes the current source file, same-directory assets, and content index entry. Bocchi cannot restore it afterward.
contentEditor.save.saved: Saved and refreshed the content index.
contentEditor.save.published: Published and refreshed the content index.
contentEditor.save.draftSaved: Draft saved and content index refreshed.
contentEditor.yaml.parseErrorFormat: Frontmatter YAML could not be parsed: {0}
contentEditor.invalidMarkdownPath: This entry only edits Markdown content. Site configuration and friend links use their own forms.
markdownEditor.title: Body
markdownEditor.toolbar.heading: Heading 2
markdownEditor.snippet.heading: Heading
themeCustomization.page.title: Theme customization
themeCustomization.page.heading: Theme customization
themeCustomization.page.description: Edit the settings and private text declared by the active frontend Theme.
themeCustomization.config.title: Settings
themeCustomization.config.empty: The active Theme does not declare editable settings.
themeCustomization.meta.title: Active Theme
themeCustomization.meta.switchThemeHint: Change the default front-end Theme in Site Profile.
themeCustomization.text.editorEmptyDescr: Choose a Theme text key to edit its enabled language values.
settings.theme.i18nDescription: Optional overrides for private text keys declared by the current Theme manifest.
settings.theme.i18nEmpty: This Theme does not declare private text keys.
settings.theme.i18nNoResults: No Theme key matches this search.
settings.theme.i18nSaved: Theme private text has been saved.
